memory.summary: Friend group is grabbing lunch right now; I need to skip my plan and join them immediately.

desires: Not feel like a snitch or unreliable to my close friends right now, even if it means skipping the assignment analysis.
Get back into that group meal before they finish eating so I don't have to awkwardly explain why I missed out.
Finish this reading section tonight without having to drag myself to bed at 1 AM and still feel guilty about missing lunch.

goals.description: Join cohort_3 for the group meal immediately (within 5 mins) to avoid looking unreliable.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value is maxed out; missing the lunch because I was 'working' feels like a betrayal to my close friends. The social cost of awkwardness outweighs the academic benefit of finishing early.

goals.description: Skip the assignment analysis right now and let it sit until tomorrow morning.
goals.rationale: I'm not going to drag myself through this soft task if it means sacrificing our meal together. I'll renegotiate the deadline later, but today's priority is keeping the peace.

goals.description: Finish the reading section tonight before bed, even if it takes all night.
goals.rationale: This is the only thing that matters for my GPA, but since I'm skipping the analysis, I need to make sure I don't feel guilty about missing lunch by doing something productive before crashing at 1 AM.
